short: A single mid‑market contract loss can wipe out your monthly net gain—turning a 2% churn rate into a 2.3× faster runway burn. Stop treating churn like a vanity metric. https://saastools.corenk.com/articles/b2b-saas-churn-rate
title: B2B SaaS Churn Rate: Why High-Contract Losses Compound Faster and What Bootstrapped Founders Must Do About It
